channel.title: Game Changer
channel.description: Latest releases from Game Changer on Dropout.tv

item.title: Earnest-est
item.description:
Ally, Zac, and Lisa try to be as sincere as possible.

Duration: 45:00

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, ally beardsley, zac oyama, lisa gilroy, paul f. tompkins, ash kron, nico romero

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "You-lympics"
item.description:
A behind the scenes look at Game Changer's "You-lympics."

Duration: 14:02

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, ryan creamer, paul robalino, sam geer, chloe badner, johnny-louise nute, jazzy collins, nico romero, ash kron, behind the scenes

item.title: You-lympics
item.description:
Brennan, Ify, and Katie compete against themselves.

Duration: 47:31

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, brennan lee mulligan, ify nwadiwe, katie marovitch, jordan myrick, demi adejuyigbe, ash kron, nico romero

item.title: Behind the Scenes of "One Year Later"
item.description:
Take a look behind the scenes of Game Changer's season 7 premiere episode, "One Year Later."

Duration: 41:58

Tags: Game Changer, sam reich, rules, challenges, game shows, competitions, improv, surprises, not like the other, mad skills, unscripted, sam geer, paul robalino, chloe badner, ryan creamer, jessyka blanco, justin cyrul, elaine carroll, nico romero, behind the scenes
